nasb.text: But they feared greatly and said, “Behold, the two kings did not stand before him; how then can we stand?”

esv.text: But they were exceedingly afraid and said, “Behold, the two kings could not stand before him. How then can we stand?”

cnv.text: 他們就十分害怕，說：“看哪，兩個王尚且不能在他面前站立得住，我們又怎能站得住呢？”

ccb.text: 他们都十分害怕，彼此商议说：“两位王都不能抵挡他，我们怎能抵挡呢？”
